libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. Meaningful tests should prefer the included MockSchemaRegistryClient or MockSchemaRegistry mock:// support with AvroSchema rather than starting a live Schema Registry/Kafka service.
risks: JSON Schema, Protobuf, and Kafka serializer/serde coverage may require separate Confluent artifacts, but those are not required for meaningful coverage of io.confluent:kafka-schema-registry-client itself.
FIPS/TLS-specific paths reference provided Bouncy Castle TLS/FIPS support; avoid making those paths mandatory unless an explicit dependency is added and verified.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No setup beyond the normal test scaffold is required: the client artifact includes an in-memory MockSchemaRegistryClient/MockSchemaRegistry and Avro schema support, while Kafka clients, Avro, Jackson, Guava, SnakeYAML, commons-compress, Swagger annotations, and HttpClient are declared as normal transitive dependencies.
